creator: nmh@t3x.org
text:
Update to version 2006-09-12.

Fix: 

-- 
Nils M Holm <nmh@t3x.org> -- http://www.t3x.org/nmh/--e7N14pawNdlHZMzfiwakZac0PzrxETwcrbz2mZGIIgY2uY7V
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

diff -ru lang/alisp.old/Makefile lang/alisp/Makefile
--- lang/alisp.old/Makefile	Mon Jul 17 21:00:38 2006
+++ lang/alisp/Makefile	Tue Sep 12 19:52:44 2006
@@ -6,9 +6,9 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	alisp
-PORTVERSION=	20060717
+PORTVERSION=	20060912
 CATEGORIES=	lang devel lisp
-MASTER_SITES=	http://www.t3x.org/files/
+MASTER_SITES=	http://t3x.org/files/
 
 MAINTAINER=	nmh@t3x.org
 COMMENT=	An interpreter for purely symbolic LISP
@@ -21,6 +21,7 @@
 		BINGRP=${BINGRP} \
 		PREFIX=${PREFIX}
 
+# Please, please keep this!
 USE_REINPLACE=	yes
 
 post-patch:
diff -ru lang/alisp.old/distinfo lang/alisp/distinfo
--- lang/alisp.old/distinfo	Mon Jul 17 21:00:38 2006
+++ lang/alisp/distinfo	Tue Sep 12 19:52:30 2006
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (alisp-20060717.tar.gz) = 5deccf952fb7e02e25b12e08286e01c6
-SIZE (alisp-20060717.tar.gz) = 70006
-SHA256 (alisp-20060717.tar.gz) = 0ea35c7756ee8980af1ed54cb3504c8b2e844a7e4096a83b6b978be0fb82b03e
+MD5 (alisp-20060912.tar.gz) = 6d503acc098f22d25957ce4e3e9b6106
+SIZE (alisp-20060912.tar.gz) = 71175
+SHA256 (alisp-20060912.tar.gz) = 2e9c8efda1f44da0c2213bd6a650b1a026af40748e3f7da41308617cdab7b729
diff -ru lang/alisp.old/pkg-plist lang/alisp/pkg-plist
--- lang/alisp.old/pkg-plist	Mon Jul 17 21:00:38 2006
+++ lang/alisp/pkg-plist	Tue Sep 12 19:52:30 2006
@@ -15,6 +15,7 @@
 %%DATADIR%%/every.l
 %%DATADIR%%/fact.l
 %%DATADIR%%/filter.l
+%%DATADIR%%/gener.l
 %%DATADIR%%/hanoi.l
 %%DATADIR%%/headp.l
 %%DATADIR%%/hyper.l
